title: rosa micrantha f. permixta
intro: Rosa micrantha f. permixta is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae), known for its fragrant pink flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rosa micrantha f. permixta include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing irritated skin. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
